paper_title: Solving a mathematical problem in different ways: A case of calculating the distance from a point to a plane

entities.description: The primary field of research involving teaching and learning of mathematics.

entities.id: Calculating the distance from a point to a plane
entities.description: The specific mathematical problem addressed in the study.
A traditional geometric approach to solving space geometry problems.
A method using the volume of polyhedra to calculate distances.
The method of using Oxyz coordinates to solve spatial problems.
A specific application of the coordinate method using plane equations and distance formulas.
Results collected from 138 students in Can Tho and Hau Giang province regarding their problem-solving approaches.
